title: sambucus florida
intro: Sambucus florida, also known as the American elderberry, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of sambucus florida are numerous and include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Sambucus florida is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is also used in jams, jellies, and wines due to its rich flavor and potential health benefits.
